name: OpenADA
tagline: Scan public websites for accessibility and language findings.
description: OpenADA helps web developers, public agencies, and civic teams find accessibility and language issues across public web pages. Check one page, queue a same-host crawl, follow durable progress, and compare public scan history over time. OpenADA combines axe-core accessibility checks with LanguageTool-compatible language analysis and publishes a browsable public archive.
starterPrompts: Check this public page for accessibility and language issues: https://example.com
Start a 5-page accessibility scan for https://example.com and report the grade when it finishes.
Show the latest public accessibility scan for www.example.com.
notes: The URLs above are submission metadata and must be verified before submitting. Automated findings are not a legal determination.
